name: canshare-tnm8-gist-pt
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) gastrointestinal stromal tumour pathological T category
description: A pathological tumour stage (pT) of a gastrointestinal stromal tumour (GIST) before initiation of treatment, using chapter 43 of the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
